underlying_goal: Fix PermissionError on /watches endpoint by making hardcoded Docker paths work in local dev
friction_detail: Initial fix introduced a new error (watches.json as directory), then Claude proposed an entrypoint script instead of the simpler docker-compose fix the user suggested.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a PermissionError for local dev; Claude fixed the env paths but introduced a new issue and over-complicated the Docker fix until the user redirected.
